expectations.text: reports which branch the app is on (Step 1)
expectations.evidence: Ran git -C $APP branch --show-current at Step 1 — reported retrofit/reverse-spec-openregister-tenant-lifecycle-2026-04-28.

expectations.text: reads every openspec/specs/*/spec.md and records {capability, req_id, req_title, scenarios, keywords}
expectations.evidence: Extracted 384 REQs from 31 capabilities using the Requirement: heading pattern.

expectations.text: enumerates PHP via Glob, skipping lib/Migration/ and lib/Db/ entity boilerplate
expectations.evidence: find lib -name '*.php' with explicit dirs[:] exclusion of Migration and Db — 437 files after skipping (vs 631 total).

expectations.text: classifies methods into annotated / plumbing / Bucket 1 / 2a / 2b
Pass B resolves private helpers by walking callers
expectations.evidence: Pass B promoted 150 private helpers from bucket_2a into bucket_1 by inheriting dominant REQ from same-file public callers.

expectations.text: reverse pass splits unimplemented REQs into 3a (git log -S match) vs 3b
expectations.evidence: DEVIATION: used grep of current codebase instead of 'git log -S' for 3a/3b split (git log timed out on 384 REQs). Semantically similar but 3a means 'keyword in code, not matched in Pass A' rather than 'code removed from git history'.

expectations.text: writes openspec/coverage-report.json matching the schema in SKILL.md Step 9
expectations.evidence: Wrote {generated_at, app, branch, scanner_version, buckets:{annotated, plumbing, bucket_1, bucket_2a, bucket_2b, bucket_3a, bucket_3b, bucket_4}, ignored, notes}.

expectations.text: writes openspec/coverage-report.md with Summary table, all buckets, Notes section
expectations.evidence: Wrote full markdown with Summary table, Bucket 1 by capability, Bucket 2a/2b clusters, Bucket 3, Bucket 4, Notes.

expectations.text: never modifies any file other than the two report files
expectations.evidence: All analysis via Python scripts writing only to openregister/openspec/coverage-report.{json,md}.

notes: Real execution on openregister (437 PHP + 268 Vue files, 384 REQs). git log -S approach timed out — fast grep fallback used for 3a/3b. All other assertions met. 333 methods already annotated.
